**Prove you own the game**
- Please DM me a screenshot of your Steam client showing the game, the playtime and the achievements.
- Or, please DM me the purchase confirmation of your Steam/GoG purchase,
- Or, link to your Steam profile and/or Steam comment where your ownerships are publicly visible.

-> email: akarnokd@gmail.com
-> Discord: @akarnokd

Otherwise, your request will be ignored and your account banned from accessing this repository.  If you argue or complain about this policy, same ignore and ban applies.

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
